hero.description: I create modern and functional web experiences

about.title: About Me
about.description: Full Stack Developer specializing in building scalable microservices using Spring Boot (Java 17/21), WebFlux, and reactive architectures. I am proficient in integrating REST APIs, SQL/NoSQL databases, and developing Angular interfaces with secure authentication (OAuth/MSAL). My expertise includes implementing AI tools (LLMs and Spring AI), deploying Kubernetes containers via GCP and Rancher, and performance optimization using JMeter. My background covers migrating critical high-concurrency services, mitigating security vulnerabilities, and collaborating in Agile environments, all built upon a foundational start in IT infrastructure and network support.
